positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette filling the center frame, rendered in deep sapphire blue and vibrant coral pink. The mountain peaks are composed of interlocking polygonal shapes, creating strong contrast against a pure white background. Below the mountain line, integrate subtle, stylized constellations and glowing geometric floral patterns in gold leaf effect. The overall composition is symmetrical, modern, and highly decorative, designed for clean apparel printing. Flat vector illustration style, strong lines, elegant symmetry, high contrast, pop art aesthetic, graphic design, scalable vector quality.
